articles.title: Mango, Cashew Crop Loss Protest Disrupts Mumbai-Goa Highway
articles.description: Demonstrators demanded immediate government compensation for heavy losses incurred by mango and cashew growers due to unseasonal weather disruptions.

articles.title: Mumbai Weather Update: City Records Fourth Heatwave In March, Oshiwara Hits 39°C; Yellow Alert For Tuesday
articles.description: Mumbai witnessed its fourth heatwave of March, with Oshiwara recording 39°C. IMD has issued a Yellow Alert for hot and humid conditions, with temperatures expected to rise further in the coming weeks.

articles.title: Mumbai Weather Update March 23, 2026: IMD Issues Heatwave Alert As Temperatures Touch 38°C; City's Overall AQI Remains In 'Poor' Category At 110
articles.description: Mumbai woke up to rising temperatures with the IMD issuing a yellow alert for heatwave-like conditions. The city may see highs of 38°C, with nearby Thane touching 39°C. Authorities advised avoiding direct sun exposure and staying hydrated. Meanwhile, the city’s AQI stood at 110, remaining in the ‘poor’ category.

articles.title: Mumbai Weather Update: IMD Warns of Heatwave Conditions in Mumbai, Thane and Raigad Today

articles.title: Mumbai braces for hot weather as IMD issues yellow alert for the city
articles.description: Mumbai weather updates: Mumbai on Monday was likely to experience clear skies and heatwave condition was very likely to prevail in the suburbs, according to IMD
